scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sstl-ai/shared && npm run build --workspace @sstl-ai/api && npm run build --workspace @sstl-ai/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @sstl-ai/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @sstl-ai/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @sstl-ai/web
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run check:demo && npm run scan:secrets
